arts.ttl: Former Derby County manager Wayne Rooney set to battle with Steven Gerrard for new job
arts.sum: Rooney, who managed Derby from 2021 to 2022, is the fifth favourite to take over from Clement, with odds of 5/1. Former Derby County manager Wayne Rooney is among the bookmakers' favourites to replace Phillippe Clement at Rangers as pressure continues to mount on the Belgian.

arts.ttl: John Eustace reveals the three key qualities he has to drum into Derby County for survival battle
arts.sum: John Eustace believes Derby County will be among the bookies' favourites to be relegated from the Championship - but is intent on creating a "siege mentality" to help them in their survival fight. Asked what fundamental characteristics were needed in a relegation battle after Eustace successfully kept Birmingham and Blackburn in the Championship, he said: "Organisation, structure, and a group of players who are willing to do anything for each other and the fans.
Tom Hill previews all 12 games in the Championship this weekend and has a score prediction for each clash.

arts.ttl: John Eustace confirms Derby County duo to stay
arts.sum: John Eustace has confirmed that first-team coach Matt Hamshaw and goalkeeping coach Andy Warrington will be part of his set-up at Derby County. Hamshaw had said he had wanted to stay at Derby after being placed in charge on an interim basis after Warne's departure earlier this month.

arts.ttl: John Eustace explains why he moved to Derby County after David Clowes talks
arts.sum: John Eustace is excited by the project at Derby County and is intent on enjoying long-term success after finally being confirmed as their new head coach. "After speaking to David, he's offered me that opportunity to be at a huge football club and to build over the next three or four years and try to bring success to it.
